title: Elytra Toggle
description: Press your sneak/crouch button when elytra flying to disable/cancel your elytra flight.
body:
# Elytra Toggle
When pressing your sneak/crouch button while flying with your elytra, your flight will be disabled. This allows you to stop flying with your elytra without having to either land or take your elytra off.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UNBKxNNxcmE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

#
<details>
<summary>Uninstallation Guide</summary>
  
If you decide to remove the datapack from your world, follow this process:
1. Run the command "/function elytratoggle:uninstall"
2. Delete the pack from your world's datapack folder (unless you want to re-enable the datapack later)

To re-enable the pack, **make sure you did not do step 2,** then run the command "/datapack enable "file/elytra_toggle.zip"

</details>

Leave comments about this project on it's [Planet Minecraft Page.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/elytra-toggle/)
